title: Proof Techniques, Invariants, and Recurrence Bounds · Structure Brief: Lower Bounds
summary: Review a proposed optimization whose runtime and correctness claims lack evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 lower bounds increment in a formal algorithm review packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Argue comparison or information lower bounds without confusing them with one implementation.
Solve recurrences with substitution, recursion trees, or master-method conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
